summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of HomePujan landing page (iteration 2). All features from the review request tested via Playwright browser automation. All critical features PASS.

issues: Minor: In shared browser session tests, the lotus 'visible' class can persist from a prior page state. On fresh load it correctly starts hidden (opacity:0, no 'visible' class). This is a test environment artifact, not an actual bug.

critical_code_review_comments: All features implemented correctly. No critical issues found.
FAQ toggleFAQ() correctly implements one-at-a-time accordion behavior.
Filter system: data-filter / data-category attribute mapping is clean and correct.
Modal system: openModal/closeModal with requestAnimationFrame double-buffering for smooth entrance animation is correct.
Backdrop click uses e.target === m guard to prevent close when clicking modal content — correct.
Escape key listener on document correctly finds and closes all visible modals.
Mobile menu auto-closes on outside click via document click listener.
Gold lotus correctly toggles based on scrollY > 350 threshold.
No 'Shop' or 'Buy' language found anywhere on the page — correct use of 'Explore' and 'Vedic Exchange'.
Mandala watermark opacity is exactly 0.05 (5%) — correct.
All WhatsApp hrefs point to 919667039964 — correct.

test_results.filter_toggle_reset_tile: PASS - clicking active tile removes 'active' class
test_results.filter_toggle_reset_opacity: PASS - all cards reset to opacity 1 on toggle

test_results.lakshmi_modal_heading: PASS - Śrī Lakṣmī-Kubera Homa heading present
test_results.lakshmi_modal_close_backdrop: PASS - clicking overlay backdrop closes modal
test_results.maha_modal_heading: PASS - Mahā Mṛtyuñjaya Homa heading present
test_results.parampara_text: PASS - 'Scholarly Parampara' and '20-Year Lineage' text present
test_results.process_svgs: PASS - SVG icons in all 3 steps
test_results.process_step_titles: PASS - Muhurta Consultation, Scholarly Preparation, Vedic Execution
test_results.faq_opens: PASS - FAQ answer opens on click
test_results.faq_closes: PASS - FAQ answer closes on second click
test_results.faq_one_at_a_time: PASS - opening new FAQ closes previously opened one
test_results.lotus_hidden_at_top: PASS - lotus has no 'visible' class at scrollY=0

test_results.lotus_scrolls_to_top: PASS - clicking lotus scrolls to scrollY=0

test_results.mobile_menu_opens: PASS - clicking hamburger adds 'open' class to mob-menu
test_results.mobile_menu_closes: PASS - clicking hamburger again removes 'open' class
test_results.mobile_single_column: PASS - hero grid stacks to single column at 375px

context_for_next_testing_agent: All HomePujan landing page features tested and passing. Static HTML at /landing.html. No backend. Key features: glassmorphism nav, hero double-frame, 3-tile filter system (data-filter/data-category), 3 service cards with modals (4-section scholarly structure each), Scholarly Parampara (maroon bg + mandala watermark), Sacred Process (3 steps), FAQ accordion (one-at-a-time), charcoal footer with gold border, gold lotus scroll-to-top, floating WhatsApp button. All WA links to 919667039964. No shop/buy language.
